# Advisor digest — worktree-session-routing (high-risk lane)

Advisor: fable (ceiling/advisor tier, AO3/AO13 Gate 3 precondition). Consulted 2026-07-18.

**1. Verdict: GO-WITH-CONDITIONS.** The shape is sound: it builds only the named remainder of a shipped feature, reuses `bootstrapWorktreeStore`/grant plumbing verbatim, keeps every mutation behind a typed zero-mutation refusal, and correctly treats a red post-merge verify as the *report*, never a rollback. Conditions are the specific git-seman
